summary: A hands-on walkthrough of runx — governed agent skill workflows with portable SKILL.md files, receipt-sealed execution, and MCP serving. Includes quick start, skill anatomy, receipt format, and links to the Frantic bounty board.
audience: developers interested in AI agent tooling, portable skills, and governed execution
why_allowed: GitHub is a public developer platform where sharing open-source projects and technical walkthroughs is the intended use. The repo links to runx.ai and github.com/runxhq/runx as required.
